title: Allocation-free Hauling claim mapping read seam
summary: Expose an owner-owned O(1) caller-owned exact Hauling mapping read keyed by descriptor, work type, offer id and opaque target id for WM-0170 B3 final revalidation.
acceptance: HaulingClaimFactsIndex exposes a public caller-owned readMappingInto surface, or an exactly equivalent owner read, keyed by descriptor, workType, offerId and opaqueTargetId; the read returns exact offer, descriptor, work type, opaque target, source and destination slot ids, source and destination interaction spot ids, mapping row version and mapping index version

The mapping read is O(1), allocation-free and read-only over existing owner mapping lanes; it fully resets the caller-owned output on every call and returns a structured stale or missing reason without interpreting opaqueTargetId as a storage slot, scanning Storage or Item owners, materializing snapshots or duplicating mapping authority in the autonomy coordinator

The new surface exposes only Hauling-owned mapping identity and versions; StorageLogisticsIndex, ItemStackStore and ReservationLedger remain the sole authorities for their exact bases, and the existing readClaimFactsInto surface remains the final composed claim-fact validation path

Focused tests prove exact-key success, every key mismatch and stale/missing mapping failure, output-object reuse, complete failure reset, zero owner mutation and unchanged snapshot/hash observations; no snapshot shape, restore behavior, schema version or runtime dependency changes

Receiver-exact TypeScript closure evidence reaches the concrete HaulingClaimFactsIndex mapping reader, proves caller-owned output identity and bounded direct indexing, and rejects allocations, owner scans, snapshot materialization, fake receivers and foreign-owner reads

The task changes only the frozen Hauling claim-fact owner surface, its focused and closure tests, package-root export and its own coordination artifacts; it does not edit WM-0170 autonomy coordinator files or generic WorkOffer, Storage, ItemStack, ReservationLedger, JobCore, historical driver, GameSession, protocol, worker or product files
requiredChecks: corepack pnpm exec prettier --check packages/sim-core/src/autonomy-claim-facts.ts packages/sim-core/src/autonomy-claim-facts.test.ts packages/sim-core/src/owner-autonomy-adoption-closure.test.ts packages/sim-core/src/index.ts coordination/tasks/WM-0184.json coordination/reports/WM-0184.md
Do not run pnpm bench, benchmark refresh, baseline update, admission or release commands for this task

history.details: Keystone returned WM0170_B3A_HAULING_ARCH_BLOCKED: B2 retains an opaque Hauling target but the owner has no allocation-free exact mapping read for the source/destination slots and mapping versions required by readClaimFactsInto. WM-0184 is the sole strict prerequisite writer; all dependencies are done.

Keystone verdict WM0184_CONSTRAINED_GATE_SUBSTITUTION_APPROVED: following the independently verified/integrated/done WM-0183 precedent, VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 corepack pnpm quality is the exact WM-0184 full-quality gate. The post-cache run passed 83 files and 1096/1096 tests in 98.97 s. Default-parallel failures remain resource-contention diagnostics only; no timeout, threshold, baseline, foreign test or gate strength is changed. Reviewer must reproduce with the same single-worker command.

Exposed allocation-free HaulingClaimFactsIndex.readMappingInto with exact four-key reset/stale semantics, public types, receiver-exact three-declaration closure, and unchanged snapshot/hash/schema. Focused 171/171 and Keystone-approved single-worker quality 1096/1096 passed; default-parallel resource contention remains documented diagnostic evidence.

changes_requested: High: packages/sim-core/src/owner-autonomy-adoption-closure.test.ts:619-635 does not lock the required exact three-declaration Hauling mapping closure manifest or SHA-256; it only asserts two helpers are present, so an extra allowed free helper would pass. Assert the complete sorted reached set/count and the trailing-newline SHA-256 babcdabd2dcc0998f84968f4959dcab37fede8d1d411d5ebacd1baf663c7deb3, retaining receiver/fake/foreign checks, then rerun focused and constrained quality gates.

packages/sim-protocol/**, packages/sim-worker/**, apps/**, packages/renderer-pixi/** or packages/ui-react/**
opaque target reinterpretation, global/owner scans, snapshot materialization, per-call hot-path allocation, schema/restore changes or duplicated foreign-owner authority

executionLane: simulation-engineer; Spark is prohibited because this task changes a public authoritative owner read boundary and receiver-exact hot-path closure
singleWriterRule: WM-0184 is the sole ready repair writer. WM-0170 remains blocked with Tally, B2 checkpoint 59c9731 and approved B3 plan checkpoint 7a483fc54701eeddb0e3285929dadb2971880075 until WM-0184 is independently verified, integrated and done.
integrationOrder: Strict prerequisite after WM-0183. Independent reviewer verification, project-director integration and done are mandatory before WM-0170 may resume; then main must be merged into the WM-0170 branch and the exact B2/typecheck/receiver-closure/seam audit rerun.
